body: "Use this guidance to:   find out more about the Local Land Charges (LLC) register get information on the migration process understand what support you can get from HM Land Registry   Overview of the programme  We have created a detailed video to give you an overview of the programme.  Migrated local authorities  Information and guidance for migrated local authorities and customers.  Local Land Charges news  Find out the latest about local land charges.  Contact us  If you have any questions about the process of migrating your LLC service to HM Land Registry’s digital register, or any of the resources contained on this site, email our project team inbox: llcproject@landregistry.gov.uk. "
